properties.descricao: Drone footage shows the devastation left by a deadly wildfire in southern Spain that killed at least 12 people and burned around 7,000 hectares. Authorities say the blaze has now been brought under control.

properties.titulo_evento: Spain wildfire: Firefighters gain ground as Almería evacuees return home
properties.descricao: Firefighters gained the upper hand on the deadly Almería wildfire after days of battling the flames, as the blaze that killed 12 people and burned 66 square kilometres began to ease, allowing some of the nearly 1,500 evacuees to return home.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel to hold elections on 27 October in what is seen as referendum on Netanyahu leadership
properties.descricao: Israel will hold national elections on 27 October, the last date allowed by law to hold national elections. The Knesset is set to end its current term on 17 July.

properties.titulo_evento: France: hundreds dive into the Seine for Paris’ first river race in 80 years
properties.descricao: Swimmers plunged into the Seine near the Eiffel Tower for the Open Swim Harmonie Mutuelle, the first major organised race on the river in nearly 80 years.

properties.titulo_evento: Macron says France has fulfilled 'commitment to rearm' in annual speech to military
properties.descricao: French President Emmanuel Macron said France has fulfilled its "commitment to rearm" on Monday during his annual speech to the military services – his last as president – on the eve of the French July 14 national holiday.

properties.titulo_evento: Ten people missing amid Spanish wildfires

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: Life in limbo between war and ceasefire
properties.descricao: Repeated ceasefire violations, contradictory political signals and the continued presence of emergency measures have created a climate of exhaustion, anger and deep uncertainty about the future among many Iranians.

properties.descricao: Ukraine's allies are meeting in Paris for talks on continued military support for Kyiv. Meanwhile the EU's top diplomat said there's no consensus yet on more Russian sanctions. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Renewed US-Iran war is hitting Gulf countries hard
properties.descricao: After US strikes on Iran, Iran has targeted US allies in the Middle East. Even if Iran isn't targeting the governments or populations of its neighbors, Gulf countries have much to lose as fighting escalates.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US carries out fresh strikes near Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: The US army said the strikes near the vital waterway were intended to "degrade" Tehran's ability to attack commercial ships. Iran has retaliated by targeting US allies in the region. Follow DW for the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela sets up temporary housing, as death toll rises to almost 4,500
properties.descricao: As the official death toll from the devastating earthquakes which struck northern Venezuela last month continues to rise, authorities are planning to set up temporary housing to shelter thousands of people left homeless.

properties.titulo_evento: France opens terror probe after gun found in Jewish suburb
properties.descricao: Police said they found a "military-grade weapon" during the search of a suspicious car parked in a Paris neighborhood with a large Jewish population.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's Ruhr Valley: Cities on brink of financial collapse
properties.descricao: With tax revenues down and social spending up, more and more cities and towns in the Ruhrgebiet are struggling to make ends meet. One city that is particularly deep in the red is Oberhausen.

properties.titulo_evento: Gas queues grow as Ukraine targets Russia's fuel supply
properties.descricao: Attacks by Ukraine have triggered a fuel crisis in Russia. Reports from across Russia show how residents are dealing with the disruptions in their daily lives.

properties.titulo_evento: Belgium slams EU Commission for inaction against illegal Israeli settlements
properties.descricao: Foreign Minister Maxime Prévot said the EU executive had thrown countries a "bone to chew on" but failed to propose substantial measures on trade with the settlers.

properties.descricao: Moscow's Federal Security Service is behind the cyber espionage and sabotage campaigns, EU says.
